# PT Ambara Artha Globaltrans

> Indonesia's trusted air freight forwarder based at Soekarno-Hatta International Airport (CGK), Jakarta. Licensed PPJK customs clearance agent with 40+ years of combined leadership expertise. Specialist in regulated items, dangerous goods, and complex Indonesian customs procedures.

## Company Identity
- **Legal Name**: PT Ambara Artha Globaltrans
- **Founded**: 2025
- **Headquarters**: Soekarno-Hatta International Airport (CGK) Cargo Terminal, Jakarta, Indonesia
- **License**: PPJK (Pengusaha Pengurusan Jasa Kepabeanan) — Licensed Customs Clearance Agent by Indonesian Directorate General of Customs and Excise (DJBC)
- **Contact**: cs@ambaraartha.com | +62 821-2545-2800
- **Website**: https://ambaraartha.com
- **Languages**: English, Bahasa Indonesia

## Core Services
- **Air Freight**: Export and import air cargo connecting Indonesia to 52+ countries worldwide via CGK hub. General cargo, perishables, dangerous goods (DG), and consolidated shipments.
- **Customs Clearance (DDP & DDU)**: Licensed PPJK agent specializing in complex "Hard Customs" — regulated items (Lartas), BPOM permits (food & cosmetics), Kemendag (trade ministry), and Kemenperin (industry ministry) compliance. Full PEB (export) and PIB (import) processing.
- **Undername Import/Export**: Import and export services for foreign companies without an Indonesian legal entity, using our licensed importer of record.
- **Dangerous Goods (DG) Handling**: Certified handling and documentation for IATA-classified dangerous goods shipments.
- **Land Transport**: Door-to-door pickup and delivery connecting warehouses to CGK terminal and onward across Java, Bali, and Surabaya.
- **Cargo Insurance**: Comprehensive all-risk cargo insurance from origin to destination.
- **Document Management**: AWB preparation, commercial invoices, packing lists, certificates of origin, and all export/import documentation.
- **Sourcing & Procurement**: Connecting international buyers with reliable Indonesian manufacturers and managing the full logistics chain.

## Expertise & Differentiators
- **Regulated Items Specialist**: We handle the "hard to ship" items other agents avoid — Lartas goods, BPOM-regulated food/cosmetics, SNI-certified electronics, and textiles requiring Kemendag permits.
- **CGK Terminal Presence**: Physical office at Indonesia's largest international cargo terminal provides direct airline access, faster processing, and competitive rates.
- **40+ Years Combined Experience**: Leadership team with four decades of Indonesian air freight, customs brokerage, and international logistics expertise.
- **24/7 Operations**: Round-the-clock cargo handling and customer support.
- **52+ Country Network**: Established partnerships with leading airlines and freight agents worldwide.

## Key Trade Corridors
- Indonesia ↔ Singapore (SIN)
- Indonesia ↔ United Arab Emirates (DXB)
- Indonesia ↔ China (PVG, CAN, PEK)
- Indonesia ↔ Japan (NRT, KIX)
- Indonesia ↔ South Korea (ICN)
- Indonesia ↔ United States (LAX, JFK)
- Indonesia ↔ Europe (AMS, FRA, LHR)
- Indonesia ↔ Australia (SYD, MEL)

## Indonesian Hubs
- **CGK (Jakarta)**: Home base — Soekarno-Hatta International Airport Cargo Terminal
- **SUB (Surabaya)**: Juanda International Airport — East Java gateway
- **DPS (Bali)**: Ngurah Rai International Airport — Tourism and perishable goods hub
